description: Composition Brown jacket made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with a single press button closure, a mock collar, zippered front placket with a full zipper closure and a press button covering, two patch pockets on the chest with press button closures, two insert pockets and two zippered pockets on the sides, adjustable loop buckles on the sides and collar and stitch detailing Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, iron or wring Dry in shade This jacket from basics is the perfect piece for winter versatility. Pair it with jeans and suede shoes, or wear unbuttoned with a monochrome shirt and form fitting jeans. Ankle high boots look best with this piece. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
